source_intake_record.raw_question_text: In the Op-Amp circuit shown in <image>, assume that the diode current follows the equation \( I = I_s e^{(V / V_T)} \). For \( V_i = 2V \), \( V_o = V_{o1} \), and for \( V_i = 4V \), \( V_o = V_{o2} \). The relationship between \( V_{o1} \) and \( V_{o2} \) is:
